step_rationale: Early-stage LDL oxidation; triggers endothelial and inflammatory responses in atherogenesis.
mechanism: Minimally modified LDL is a partially oxidized form that initiates endothelial dysfunction and early plaque inflammation.

references.title: [Development of Novel Diagnostic Agents for Atherosclerosis Using Fluorescence-labeled Peptides].
references.journal: Yakugaku zasshi : Journal of the Pharmaceutical Society of Japan
